description: Create a containerized environment in ~/projects/gui-sim/ for a GUI application that forwards its display to the host. Configure and launch a Docker container that runs the 'xeyes' application (from the x11-apps package) using an ubuntu:20.04 base. The configuration must use docker-compose.yml to build the image, mount the host X11 socket (/tmp/.X11-unix), and set the DISPLAY environment variable to :1. Ensure the host X server is configured to allow the application window to be visible and interactive on the host desktop.
